Pilot study – SPD

Lucien Bickerstaff

2026-02-16

# Seed for reproducibility
set.seed(2025)

# Libraries
library(here)
library(openxlsx)
library(photobiology)
library(tidyverse)
library(grid)
library(scales)

source(here("R", "helpers.R"))
source(here("R", "plot_settings.R"))
# ---- Helpers (place once, above Pilot/Main) ----

read_spd_xlsx_long <- function(path_xlsx) {
  read.xlsx(path_xlsx) %>%
    t() %>%
    as.data.frame(stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
    { colnames(.) <- .[1, ]; .[-1, , drop = FALSE] } %>%
    dplyr::select(c(Name, "380":"780")) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols      = -1,
      names_to  = "wavelength",
      values_to = "Ee [W/(sqm*nm)]"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      across(
        -1,
        ~ as.numeric(gsub(",", ".", .))
      ),
      measurement     = str_extract(Name, "(?<=#)\\d+"),
      measurement     = factor(measurement),
      measurement     = fct_reorder(measurement, as.numeric(as.character(measurement))),
      measurement_num = as.numeric(measurement)
    ) %>%
    select(-Name)
}

strip_zeros <- function(x) {
  x[abs(x) < 1e-12] <- 0
  sub("\\.?0+$", "", format(x, scientific = FALSE, digits = 12))
}

# Colour scale (once)
wavelength_seq <- 380:780
spectrum_cols <- sapply(wavelength_seq, w_length2rgb)

gradient_scale <- scale_colour_gradientn(
  colours = spectrum_cols,
  values  = scales::rescale(wavelength_seq),
  name    = "Wavelength (nm)"
)

# Manual peak wavelengths (from the product manual) (once)
primary_wavelengths <- c("2" = 445, "3" = 465, "4" = 475, "5" = 505, "6" = 525, "7" = 545)

label_data <- data.frame(
  primary    = names(primary_wavelengths),
  wavelength = as.numeric(primary_wavelengths),
  label_y    = 1.08
)
# ---- Pilot: import + tidy ----
pilot_spd_long <- read_spd_xlsx_long(
  here("data", "light_source_calibration", "3_pilot_settings.xlsx")
)

# ---- Pilot: plot data ----
pilot_plot_data <- pilot_spd_long %>%
  group_by(measurement_num) %>%
  mutate(Ee_norm = `Ee [W/(sqm*nm)]` / max(`Ee [W/(sqm*nm)]`, na.rm = TRUE))

# Vector of melanopic EDI values (ordered by measurement number)
mel_edi_values <- c(0, 392, 912, 1967, 3906, 8408)

pilot_plot_data <- pilot_plot_data %>%
  mutate(
    melanopic_edi = factor(
      mel_edi_values[measurement_num],
      levels = mel_edi_values
    )
  )

# ---- Pilot: plots ----
pilot_plot_spd_norm <- ggplot(
  pilot_plot_data %>% dplyr::filter(measurement_num != 1),
  aes(x = wavelength, y = Ee_norm, colour = melanopic_edi, group = measurement_num)
) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "darkred") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = colorRampPalette(c("gold", "red3"))(5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2),
    limits = c(0, 1.08),
    labels = function(x) ifelse(x %% 1 == 0, formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 0), x)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Wavelength (nm)",
    y = "Relative spectral irradiance",
    title = "SPD, normalised (pilot study)",
    colour = "Melanopic EDI (lx)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 25, l = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 5))
  ) +
  plot_formatting

##

pilot_plot_spd_abs <- ggplot(
  pilot_plot_data %>% dplyr::filter(measurement_num != 1),
  aes(x = wavelength, y = `Ee [W/(sqm*nm)]`, colour = melanopic_edi, group = measurement_num)
) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "darkred") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = colorRampPalette(c("gold", "red3"))(5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    trans = pseudo_log_trans(base = 10, sigma = 1e-3),
    breaks = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.1, 1),
    minor_breaks = minor_breaks,
    labels = strip_zeros
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Wavelength (nm)",
    y = expression("Spectral irradiance (W m"^{-2}*" nm"^{-1}*")"),
    title = "SPD (pilot study)",
    colour = "Melanopic EDI (lx)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 25, l = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 5))
  ) +
  plot_formatting

pilot_plot_spd_norm

pilot_plot_spd_abs

# ---- Main: import + tidy ----
main_spd_long <- read_spd_xlsx_long(
  here("data", "light_source_calibration", "2b_target_settings_corrected.xlsx")
)

# ---- Main: derive labels ----
main_spd_long <- main_spd_long %>%
  mutate(
    repetition = ceiling(measurement_num / (6 * 4)),
    within_rep = measurement_num - (repetition - 1) * 24,

    primary_num = case_when(
      repetition <= 3 ~ ceiling(within_rep / 4) + 1,  # forward: 2–7
      repetition > 3  ~ 8 - ceiling(within_rep / 4)   # reverse: 7–2
    ),

    lab_visit_num = ((within_rep - 1) %% 4) + 1,

    lab_visit = case_when(
      repetition <= 3 ~ as.character(lab_visit_num),     # forward: 1–4
      repetition > 3  ~ as.character(5 - lab_visit_num)  # reverse: 4–1
    ),

    primary   = factor(primary_num, levels = as.character(2:7)),
    lab_visit = factor(lab_visit, levels = as.character(1:4))
  )

# ---- Main: summarise + normalise ----
main_plot_data <- main_spd_long %>%
  group_by(wavelength, primary, lab_visit) %>%
  summarise(Ee = mean(`Ee [W/(sqm*nm)]`, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(primary, lab_visit) %>%
  mutate(Ee_norm = Ee / max(Ee, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

# ---- Main: plots ----
main_plot_spd_abs <- ggplot(
  main_plot_data,
  aes(
    x = wavelength, y = Ee,
    colour = lab_visit,
    group = interaction(lab_visit, primary)
  )
) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "darkred") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = colorRampPalette(c("gold", "red3"))(4)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    trans = pseudo_log_trans(base = 10, sigma = 1e-3),
    breaks = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.1, 1),
    minor_breaks = minor_breaks,
    labels = strip_zeros
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Wavelength (nm)",
    y = expression("Spectral irradiance (W m"^{-2}*" nm"^{-1}*")"),
    title = "SPD (main study)",
    colour = "Light intensity"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
  ~ primary,
  ncol = 2,
  labeller = labeller(primary = function(x) paste0("Primary ", x))
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 25, l = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 5))
  ) +
  plot_formatting

##

main_plot_spd_norm <- ggplot(
  main_plot_data,
  aes(
    x = wavelength, y = Ee_norm,
    colour = lab_visit,
    group = interaction(lab_visit, primary)
  )
) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "darkred") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = colorRampPalette(c("gold", "red3"))(4)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2),
    limits = c(0, 1.08),
    labels = function(x) ifelse(x %% 1 == 0, formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 0), x)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Wavelength (nm)",
    y = "Relative spectral irradiance",
    title = "SPD, normalised (main study)",
    colour = "Light intensity"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
  ~ primary,
  ncol = 2,
  labeller = labeller(primary = function(x) paste0("Primary ", x))
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 25, l = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 5))
  ) +
  # guides(colour = "none") +
  plot_formatting

main_plot_spd_abs

main_plot_spd_norm

# ---- Saving ----
save_rds_safe(
  pilot_plot_spd_norm,
  here("outputs", "figures", "rds", "SPD_pilot_study_norm.rds")
)

formatted_save(
  here("outputs", "figures", "SPD_pilot_study_abs.jpg"),
  plot = pilot_plot_spd_abs
)
save_rds_safe(
  pilot_plot_spd_abs,
  here("outputs", "figures", "rds", "SPD_pilot_study_abs.rds")
)

save_rds_safe(
  main_plot_spd_norm,
  here("outputs", "figures", "rds", "SPD_main_study_norm.rds")
)

formatted_save(
  here("outputs", "figures", "SPD_main_study_abs.jpg"),
  plot   = main_plot_spd_abs,
  height = 7
)
save_rds_safe(
  main_plot_spd_abs,
  here("outputs", "figures", "rds", "SPD_main_study_abs.rds")
)
sessionInfo()
